The '''''Galactic Guardian''''' was an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] used by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], and later by the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
The ''Galactic Guardian'' first saw service in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Republic Navy/Legends|Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], where it was adorned with lateral red markings port and starboard of the centerline, and wore the symbol of the [[Open Circle Fleet/Legends|Open Circle Fleet]].<ref name="SWPM" />

''Galactic Guardian'' later served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
